capabilities.name: Service duration rules
capabilities.verify: book_appointment_slot RPC/skill derives end_time from booking_services.duration_minutes + rejects same-service overlap (tstzrange) (migration 20260614050000); check_availability (agent-execute/index.ts ~L4231-4277) now also aligns its free_slots grid to the service's duration_minutes instead of a fixed 30-min grid (commit fd480a83, 2026-07-02)
capabilities.notes: Built + scratch-Postgres verified 2026-06-14: 45-min service 10:00→10:45, overlapping 10:30 rejected (slot_unavailable), adjacent 10:45 allowed, cancelled frees slot. The previously-pending slot-generator + UI have since shipped in code: check_availability now returns duration-aligned free_slots (fd480a83), and SmartBookingBlock.tsx, CreateBookingDialog.tsx and BookingServicesTab.tsx all read/display duration_minutes end-to-end. Pending: Stage-3 runtime sign-off only before flipping to done. STAGE-3 VERIFIED LIVE 2026-07-04 (rzhj via MCP gateway, temp fwk key): book_appointment_slot for 45-min service 2026-07-06T10:00+02 -> end 10:45 derived (duration_minutes:45, booking 42f9af68); overlapping 10:30 rejected (slot_unavailable); check_availability returns duration-aligned free_slots + booked_ranges. Test booking cancelled after verification. NOTE: the service_id-filtered check_availability path crashes on live ('sanitizeOrTerm is not defined' — deployed agent-execute lost the helper; defect filed, code in repo is correct).

capabilities.name: Staff assignment
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3): created a test booking via book_appointment, then manage_bookings assign_staff set assigned_employee_id to a live employee (QA Hire, 2a610ac5-...), confirmed via get; test booking cancelled after. bookings.assigned_employee_id uuid REFERENCES employees(id) ON DELETE SET NULL (migration 20260703150000_booking-staff-assignment.sql); staff Select in CreateBookingDialog.tsx and the booking detail dialog in BookingsPage.tsx (src/pages/admin/BookingsPage.tsx); manage_bookings action=assign_staff in agent-execute/index.ts executeBookingsManagement() + skill schema in booking-module.ts
capabilities.notes: Built 2026-07-03, not yet live-DB verified (no Supabase creds in this session) — schema/UI/skill wired end-to-end by code inspection but the migration has not been run against a live instance. employees (general HR/staff table) confirmed as the correct FK target over consultant_profiles (niche consultant-marketplace table with hourly_rate_cents/portfolio_url/embedding fields, unrelated concept) by reading both table definitions in baseline.sql.

capabilities.name: Appointment reminders
capabilities.verify: supabase/functions/send-booking-reminders/index.ts sweeps confirmed bookings with start_time within 24h and reminder_sent_at IS NULL, emails via email-send, stamps reminder_sent_at; wired as a 7th job ('booking-reminders', every 15 min) in register_flowpilot_cron() (migration 20260703152000_booking-reminders-cron.sql), the same cron.schedule+net.http_post mechanism as every other FlowPilot periodic job
capabilities.notes: Built 2026-07-03, not yet live-DB/live-cron verified in this session (no Supabase creds) — finally wires the previously dead bookings.reminder_sent_at column. Mirrors send-booking-confirmation's settings lookup + email-send dispatch pattern closely (new file, same class of transactional email). Edge function needs `supabase functions deploy send-booking-reminders --no-verify-jwt` per the deploy runbook before the cron job it registers can succeed.

capabilities.name: No-show tracking
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3): manage_bookings update_status set a booking to 'no_show' and it was ACCEPTED (the bookings_status_check CHECK constraint allows no_show), confirmed via get. bookings_status_check CHECK constraint extended with 'no_show' (migration 20260703151000_booking-no-show-status.sql, drop+recreate pattern matching 20260629142430_outbound_communications_direction_check); 'Mark No-show' action in BookingsPage.tsx booking-list dropdown (gated by canMarkNoShow: status=confirmed and start_time in the past) and as a status option in the detail dialog; manage_bookings action=update_status accepts status=no_show via the existing status-update path (agent-execute/index.ts, booking-module.ts)
capabilities.notes: Built 2026-07-03, not yet live-DB verified in this session (no Supabase creds) — CHECK constraint change + UI + skill metadata wired by code inspection; agent-execute's executeBookingsManagement() update_status branch was already generic over any status string, so no handler code change was needed there beyond the CHECK constraint and skill description.
